Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I vaguely remember receiving a {f 0 1 41}Gekkoukan{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 41}Boogie{f 0 1 27} CD from someone in the PA club...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are microphones, headphones, and[n]unfamiliar devices inside the PA room...[n]{f 1 1}
